chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Ist Appeal 86 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 16.10.2023 None present on behalf of the appellant. Even on the last date no one was in attendance. There is no intimation either. Dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad/PA
